sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 뉴몬트는 2025년 2분기 사상 최대 17억 달러의 잉여현금흐름을 달성하고 30억 달러 규모의 추가 자사주 매입을 승인했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2분기 150만 온스의 금 생산과 함께 사상 최대 분기 잉여현금흐름인 17억 달러를 기록했습니다.
주주 환원을 위해 30억 달러 규모의 추가 자사주 매입 프로그램을 승인하고 주당 0.25달러의 배당을 선언했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 자산 매각 프로그램을 통해 올해 총 30억 달러 이상의 세후 현금 유입을 예상하며, 이 중 25억 달러는 운영 자산 매각에서 발생할 전망입니다.
부채를 3억 7,200만 달러 상환하여 재무 건전성을 강화했으며, 62억 달러의 현금과 102억 달러의 총 유동성을 확보했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 조정 EBITDA는 30억 달러를 달성했으며, 순부채 대비 조정 EBITDA 비율은 0.1배를 기록했습니다.

watchItems.text: 자산 매각 프로그램의 잔여 일정과 Coffee 개발 프로젝트의 매각 진행 상황을 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 newmontq22025earningsrelea.htm EX-99.1 Document NYSE: NEM, ASX: NEM, TSX: NGT, PNGX: NEM Exhibit 99.1 Newmont Reports Second Quarter 2025 Results DENVER, July 24, 2025 – Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, ASX: NEM, TSX: NGT, PNGX: NEM) (Newmont or the Company) today announced second quarter 2025 results, an additional $3.0 billion share repurchase program and declared a dividend of $0.25 1 per share. "Newmont delivered a strong second quarter, producing approximately 1.5 million attributable gold ounces and generating an all time record quarterly free cash flow of $1.7 billion, underscoring the strength of our world-class portfolio and the disciplined execution of the commitments we shared at the beginning of the year," said Tom Palmer, Newmont's Chief Executive Officer. "We remain firmly on track to achieve our 2025 guidance as we continu  Normalized numeric aliases: $3.0 billion = 30억 달러; 1.5 million = 150만 달러; $1.7 billion = 17억 달러; $3.0 = 3.0달러; $0.25 = 0.25달러; $1.7 = 1.7달러.

ize our operations and deliver long term value to shareholders." Q2 2025 Results ▪ Reported Net Income of $2.1 billion, Adjusted Net Income (ANI) 2 of $1.6 billion equating to $1.43 per diluted share and Adjusted EBITDA 2 of $3.0 billion ▪ On track to meet Newmont's 2025 guidance 3 , with second quarter results in line with indications provided in February 2025 ▪ Expect to receive more than $3.0 billion in after tax cash proceeds from the divestiture program this year including approximately $2.5 billion from divested assets 4 and approximately $470 million from the sale of equity shares in Greatland Resources and Discovery Silver 5 ▪ Generated $2.4 billion of cash fro  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.1 billion = 21억 달러; $1.6 billion = 16억 달러; $3.0 billion = 30억 달러; $2.5 billion = 25억 달러; $470 million = 4억 7,000만 달러; $2.4 billion = 24억 달러; $156 million = 1억 5,600만 달러; $1.7 billion = 17억 달러; $2.1 = 2.1달러; $470 = 470달러; $2.5 = 2.5달러; $2.4 = 2.4달러; $156 = 156달러; $1.7 = 1.7달러; $1.0 = 1.0달러.

s since the last earnings call 6 ; declared a dividend of $0.25 per share of common stock for the second quarter of 2025 ▪ Newmont's Board authorized an additional $3.0 billion share repurchase program to be executed at the Company's discretion 7 ▪ Produced 1.5 million gold ounces from Newmont's Core Portfolio, as well as 36 thousand tonnes of copper ▪ Maintained a strong and flexible investment-grade balance sheet, ending the quarter with $6.2 billion in cash and $10.2 billion in total liquidity 8 ▪ Reduced debt by $372 million since the last earnings call; reported Net debt to Adjusted EBITDA 2 of 0.1x ▪ Published 21st Annual Sustainability Report and 4th Annual Taxes and Royalties Contribution Report, providing a transparent review of Newmont's sustainability p  Normalized numeric aliases: $3.0 billion = 30억 달러; 1.5 million = 150만 달러; $6.2 billion = 62억 달러; $10.2 billion = 102억 달러; $372 million = 3억 7,200만 달러; $0.25 = 0.25달러; $3.0 = 3.0달러; $6.2 = 6.2달러; $372 = 372달러; $10.2 = 10.2달러.

f $0.25 per share of common stock for the second quarter of 2025, payable on September 29, 2025 to holders of record at the close of business on September 4, 2025. 2 Non-GAAP metrics; see reconciliations at the end of this release. 3 See discussion of guidance and cautionary statement at the end of this release regarding forward-looking statements. 4 All operating sites previously announced for divestment have been sold, with the Coffee development project remaining designated as held for sale. No agreement has been reached with respect to Coffee as of the date of this release. 5 Shares in Greatland Resources were received as part of the sale consideration for Telfer and Havieron and shares in Discovery Silver Corp were received as part of the sale consideration for Porcupine. For further details see the 'Divestiture Program Update' section below. $470 million of net proceeds from sale o  Normalized numeric aliases: $470 million = 4억 7,000만 달러; $0.25 = 0.25달러; $470 = 470달러.
